name: testTransactionTableMatchesDownloadedPdf
description: The transaction table data on the UI matches the exported PDF file data.
descriptionHtml: The transaction table data on the UI matches the exported PDF file data.

steps.name: Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: The transaction table data on the UI matches the exported PDF file data.

steps.name: Set start and end date: 27-07-2025 to 27-07-2025
Select 'MerchantCompanyForTestRunOnly Inc.' business unit using filter
Click 'Export table data to file' button
Read and parse transactions from PDF text
